## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync to discuss content strategy, SEO, and analytics for Hotel Engine](https://fathom.video/share/ZrEkzLZmS3HixRqR5aC2xCg9aSGBi5Tm?tab=summary&timestamp=166.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Programmatic SEO pages (30k+) need indexation and performance analysis](https://fathom.video/share/ZrEkzLZmS3HixRqR5aC2xCg9aSGBi5Tm?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Content quality is good; industry prioritization list shared for future focus](https://fathom.video/share/ZrEkzLZmS3HixRqR5aC2xCg9aSGBi5Tm?tab=summary&timestamp=722.0)
  - [Analytics show 50% increase in impressions; clicks steady](https://fathom.video/share/ZrEkzLZmS3HixRqR5aC2xCg9aSGBi5Tm?tab=summary&timestamp=1633.0)
  - [Potential Cloudflare issue blocking LLM traffic needs investigation](https://fathom.video/share/ZrEkzLZmS3HixRqR5aC2xCg9aSGBi5Tm?tab=summary&timestamp=1427.0)

## Topics

### Programmatic SEO Pages

  - [30,000+ pages created for "hotels good for \[event\] in \[city\]"](https://fathom.video/share/ZrEkzLZmS3HixRqR5aC2xCg9aSGBi5Tm?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Not currently indexed; team to analyze and advise on best practices](https://fathom.video/share/ZrEkzLZmS3HixRqR5aC2xCg9aSGBi5Tm?tab=summary&timestamp=313.0)
  - [Concern about potential negative SEO impact](https://fathom.video/share/ZrEkzLZmS3HixRqR5aC2xCg9aSGBi5Tm?tab=summary&timestamp=259.0)
  - [GrowthX to monitor, diagnose, and propose solutions](https://fathom.video/share/ZrEkzLZmS3HixRqR5aC2xCg9aSGBi5Tm?tab=summary&timestamp=505.0)
  - [Hotel Engine to improve relevance of page content](https://fathom.video/share/ZrEkzLZmS3HixRqR5aC2xCg9aSGBi5Tm?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)

### Content Audit and Deletion

  - [Previous agency provided list of blog posts to delete](https://fathom.video/share/ZrEkzLZmS3HixRqR5aC2xCg9aSGBi5Tm?tab=summary&timestamp=596.0)
  - [GrowthX to review list and conduct own audit](https://fathom.video/share/ZrEkzLZmS3HixRqR5aC2xCg9aSGBi5Tm?tab=summary&timestamp=633.0)
  - [Goal: free up crawl budget for new programmatic pages](https://fathom.video/share/ZrEkzLZmS3HixRqR5aC2xCg9aSGBi5Tm?tab=summary&timestamp=568.0)
  - [Potential traffic lift by removing outdated content](https://fathom.video/share/ZrEkzLZmS3HixRqR5aC2xCg9aSGBi5Tm?tab=summary&timestamp=626.0)

### Industry Prioritization for Content

  - [James shared detailed industry/sub-industry list sorted by revenue](https://fathom.video/share/ZrEkzLZmS3HixRqR5aC2xCg9aSGBi5Tm?tab=summary&timestamp=779.0)
  - [GrowthX to focus on broader industries (e.g., construction) while mentioning sub-categories](https://fathom.video/share/ZrEkzLZmS3HixRqR5aC2xCg9aSGBi5Tm?tab=summary&timestamp=888.0)
  - [Need to consider variation within sub-industries for content relevance](https://fathom.video/share/ZrEkzLZmS3HixRqR5aC2xCg9aSGBi5Tm?tab=summary&timestamp=914.0)

### Content Approval Process

  - [James prefers email and Slack notifications for approvals](https://fathom.video/share/ZrEkzLZmS3HixRqR5aC2xCg9aSGBi5Tm?tab=summary&timestamp=1011.0)
  - [Refreshed content doesn't need approval; GrowthX can lead on updates](https://fathom.video/share/ZrEkzLZmS3HixRqR5aC2xCg9aSGBi5Tm?tab=summary&timestamp=987.0)

### Charge Card and Octave API Updates

  - [Charge card materials on hold; update expected in 1-2 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/ZrEkzLZmS3HixRqR5aC2xCg9aSGBi5Tm?tab=summary&timestamp=1047.0)
  - [Octave API: James to add GrowthX team to tool access](https://fathom.video/share/ZrEkzLZmS3HixRqR5aC2xCg9aSGBi5Tm?tab=summary&timestamp=1101.0)
  - [Potential collaboration between Octave team and GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/ZrEkzLZmS3HixRqR5aC2xCg9aSGBi5Tm?tab=summary&timestamp=1107.0)

### Analytics Overview

  - [50% increase in impressions, clicks holding steady](https://fathom.video/share/ZrEkzLZmS3HixRqR5aC2xCg9aSGBi5Tm?tab=summary&timestamp=1633.0)
  - [New pages (e.g., prepaid travel cards, weddings) showing growth](https://fathom.video/share/ZrEkzLZmS3HixRqR5aC2xCg9aSGBi5Tm?tab=summary&timestamp=1686.0)
  - [Updated/refreshed content seeing positive trends](https://fathom.video/share/ZrEkzLZmS3HixRqR5aC2xCg9aSGBi5Tm?tab=summary&timestamp=1802.0)
  - [Decrease in branded queries, indicating improved visibility](https://fathom.video/share/ZrEkzLZmS3HixRqR5aC2xCg9aSGBi5Tm?tab=summary&timestamp=1740.0)

### LLM Visibility and Cloudflare Issue

  - [GrowthX working on collaborative process for tracking LLM prompts](https://fathom.video/share/ZrEkzLZmS3HixRqR5aC2xCg9aSGBi5Tm?tab=summary&timestamp=1145.0)
  - [Potential Cloudflare default setting blocking LLM traffic](https://fathom.video/share/ZrEkzLZmS3HixRqR5aC2xCg9aSGBi5Tm?tab=summary&timestamp=1427.0)
  - [GrowthX to investigate and provide guidance](https://fathom.video/share/ZrEkzLZmS3HixRqR5aC2xCg9aSGBi5Tm?tab=summary&timestamp=1501.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Joel to share list of blog posts for potential deletion](https://fathom.video/share/ZrEkzLZmS3HixRqR5aC2xCg9aSGBi5Tm?tab=summary&timestamp=596.0)
  - [GrowthX to review industry prioritization list and adjust content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/ZrEkzLZmS3HixRqR5aC2xCg9aSGBi5Tm?tab=summary&timestamp=722.0)
  - [James to provide charge card materials in 1-2 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/ZrEkzLZmS3HixRqR5aC2xCg9aSGBi5Tm?tab=summary&timestamp=1047.0)
  - [GrowthX to investigate Cloudflare LLM traffic blocking issue](https://fathom.video/share/ZrEkzLZmS3HixRqR5aC2xCg9aSGBi5Tm?tab=summary&timestamp=1427.0)
  - [Joel to explore Amplitude for deeper conversion influence analysis](https://fathom.video/share/ZrEkzLZmS3HixRqR5aC2xCg9aSGBi5Tm?tab=summary&timestamp=1860.0)
